name: Fluttering Butterflies
recipeInstructions:
1. Put nuts into a plastic baggie inside a second plastic baggie. Close bags and set on cutting board.
2. Crush nuts with wood mallet or rolling pin and set aside.
3. Grease a large baking sheet.
4. For the base of each butterfly, sprinkle about 1/2 teaspoon of the crushed nuts in a small circle on the baking sheet. Circles should be about 2 inches apart.
5. Arrange 2 pretzels side by side on top of the nuts.
6. Unwrap caramels and put them, milk and butter into a 4-cup liquid measuring cup. Do not cover.
7. Place in microwave on High power for 1 min. and 30 seconds.
8. After cooking, stir with a wooden spoon. If not soft enough to stir smooth, cook for 30 secs to 1 minute more.
9. Spoon 1 teaspoon of the mixture into the middle of the two pretzels. Push caramel off the teaspoon with a small spoon.
10. Use kitchen scissors to cut licorice into 1 inch long pieces.
11. Press 2 pieces of licorice into the top of the caramel to make antennae.
12. Chill, uncovered, in refrig. for 30 minutes or until firm.
13. Put chocolate chips into a 2-cup liquid measuring cup.
14. Micro-cook, uncovered, on high for 1 minute to 1 minute and 30 seconds or till melted.
15. Spoon about 1/2 teaspoon of the melted chocolate onto each butterfly.
16. Chill about 15 minutes or till chocolate is firm.
17. Store in a single layer in a tightly covered container in the refrig. Makes 24.
